name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers same-day and next-day emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services at physical locations nationwide.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a network of physical store locations across the United States. The company provides quick access to emergency cash through various lending and financial products designed for consumers who need immediate funds. Based on their website navigation, ACE has been operating for multiple decades and maintains a substantial retail footprint with locations in various states including Colorado, California, and Louisiana.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse range of financial services beyond basic emergency loans. Their service menu includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax preparation services, and business financial solutions. The company advertises online loan options alongside their physical store network, indicating they serve both digital and in-person customers. They maintain dedicated customer service phone lines and email support for both general inquiries and online loan operations.

The company distinguishes itself through multi-location availability and service breadth. Rather than specializing in a single product, ACE operates as a comprehensive financial services provider for unbanked and underbanked consumers. Their physical store presence differentiates them from pure online lenders, allowing customers to conduct transactions in person. The company also participates in community engagement, as evidenced by promotional activities like their back-to-school gift card contest.

As an emergency cash lender, ACE serves a high-risk consumer segment and charges rates typical of the industry. The website indicates service availability varies by state, with specific loan products unavailable in certain jurisdictions. The 404 errors on their website suggest potential outdated location pages or technical issues. Consumers should verify current rates, terms, and availability before applying, as emergency cash loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional bank products.
pros: Multiple service options including installment loans, title loans, and check cashing available at single locations
Same-day or next-day funding for emergency cash needs
Nationwide network of physical store locations for in-person service
Online loan options available for digital-first customers
Multiple customer service channels (phone and email) for both general and online inquiries
Offers specialized services like tax preparation and business financial services
No website paywall or credit score requirement barriers shown for basic information access
cons: Emergency cash loans typically carry very high APR rates (standard in this category but expensive for borrowers)
Service availability restricted by state—not all products available in all locations
Website contains broken links and 404 errors on specific service pages, suggesting maintenance issues
Physical location dependency limits accessibility compared to fully digital competitors
Requires store visit or online application for most services rather than instant digital processing
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash within 1-2 days and unable to access traditional bank loans
Individuals with vehicle title who need collateral-based lending options
Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer in-person financial transactions
Customers requiring bundled services like check cashing plus emergency loans in one location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers facing urgent financial emergencies who have a vehicle title or reliable income and can access a physical location or apply online. The primary caveat is that emergency cash loans carry substantially higher interest rates than traditional lending—borrowers should exhaust other options and carefully review APR and fees before committing.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
